query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "domainshuttle: freeform open domain subject-driven text-to-video gener" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the same core mechanism (subject-driven video customization) and domain (text-to-video generation) as the user's question, satisfying criteria (a) and (b) by providing state-of-the-art context and alternative methodologies (feedforward vs. the user's implied follow-up) for the specific task of extending subject-driven video generation.
